parameters.description: Send notifications to your own IFTTT destination through the UnitySVC gateway. POST the unified message envelope {title, body, type, format}; the gateway composes an Apprise ifttt:// URL from your stored secrets and delivers via apprise.unitysvc.dev. The free apprise channel uses your own stored credentials; the apprise-plus channel binds extra per-enrollment destinations via parameters. The gateway / gateway-plus transformer channels instead POST a native IFTTT Webhooks payload directly to maker.ifttt.com, bypassing Apprise.
parameters.gateway_plus_price_description: $0.001 per message — extra per-enrollment IFTTT destinations, direct
parameters.gateway_price_description: Free — direct to your IFTTT Webhooks endpoint (no Apprise)
parameters.gateway_url_plus: ${ customer_secrets.IFTTT_WEBHOOK_BASE ?? https://maker.ifttt.com }/trigger/${ customer_secrets.{{ params.event_secret }} }/with/key/${ customer_secrets.{{ params.webhook_id_secret }} }

event_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's IFTTT event name

events_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's IFTTT events

webhook_id_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's IFTTT webhook id
